CharacterBoard.title: CharacterBoard
CharacterBoard.description: A generated board of AAC icons for a specific character configuration.

attributesHash.description: A deterministic string of the character attributes.

attributes.description: The character attributes used to generate this board.

icons.description: A map of actionId to the generated image URL.

/character_boards/{boardId}.description: Stores generated AAC boards keyed by their attributes hash.
